mapper.sql: id, project_id, username, dataset, variable, where_clause, pages, origin, sort_order, created_time, updated_time, created_by
mapper.update: UPDATE sas_pages_data SET dataset = #{dataset}, variable = #{variable}, where_clause = #{whereClause}, pages = #{pages}, origin = #{origin}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sas_pages_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT dataset FROM sas_pages_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY dataset
